mapper.select:
SELECT client_id AS clientId, client_name AS clientName, client_type1 AS clientType1, client_type2 AS clientType2, business_number AS businessNumber, ceo_name AS ceoName, client_tel AS clientTel, business_type AS businessType, business_product AS businessProduct, manager_name AS managerName, manager_dept AS managerDept, manager_tel AS managerTel, manager_email AS managerEmail, fax_number AS faxNumber, post_code AS postCode, address AS address, address_detail AS addressDetail, status_code AS statusCode, created_at AS createdAt
FROM client
(client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY client_name ASC
ORDER BY client_name DESC
ORDER BY business_number ASC
ORDER BY business_number DESC
ORDER BY created_at ASC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY status_code ASC
ORDER BY status_code DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client
(client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client ( client_id, client_name, client_type1, client_type2, business_number, ceo_name, client_tel, business_type, business_product, manager_name, manager_dept, manager_tel, manager_email, fax_number, post_code, address, address_detail, status_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{clientId}, #{clientName}, #{clientType1}, #{clientType2}, #{businessNumber}, #{ceoName}, #{clientTel}, #{businessType}, #{businessProduct}, #{managerName}, #{managerDept}, #{managerTel}, #{managerEmail}, #{faxNumber}, #{postCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{statusCode}, CURRENT_DATE )
mapper.select: SELECT client_id AS clientId, client_name AS clientName, client_type1 AS clientType1, client_type2 AS clientType2, business_number AS businessNumber, ceo_name AS ceoName, client_tel AS clientTel, business_type AS businessType, business_product AS businessProduct, manager_name AS managerName, manager_dept AS managerDept, manager_tel AS managerTel, manager_email AS managerEmail, fax_number AS faxNumber, post_code AS postCode, address AS address, address_detail AS addressDetail, status_code AS statusCode, created_at AS createdAt FROM client WHERE client_id = #{clientId}

SELECT client_id AS clientId, client_name AS clientName, client_tel AS clientTel, address AS address, address_detail AS addressDetail, manager_name AS managerName, post_code AS postCode FROM client ORDER BY client_name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE client SET client_name = #{clientName}, client_type1 = #{clientType1}, client_type2 = #{clientType2}, business_number = #{businessNumber}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, client_tel = #{clientTel}, business_type = #{businessType}, business_product = #{businessProduct}, manager_name = #{managerName}, manager_dept = #{managerDept}, manager_tel = #{managerTel}, manager_email = #{managerEmail}, fax_number = #{faxNumber}, post_code = #{postCode}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, status_code = #{statusCode} WHERE client_id = #{clientId}
